title: Record Submission: 1.1078 BPB — XSA6 + BigramHash4K on Hedge Mixer Stack
body:
## Summary

- **val_bpb: 1.1078** (3-seed mean, std 0.0045)
- Seeds: 42=1.1045, 1337=1.1061, 2025=1.1129
- Built on PR #700 (@RoyiRa) with two hyperparameter changes found via systematic combinatorial search

## Changes from PR #700

| Parameter | Default | Ours |
|-----------|---------|------|
| `XSA_LAST_N` | 4 | **6** |
| `BIGRAM_VOCAB_SIZE` | 2048 | **4096** |

## Test plan

- [x] 3 seeds run on 8xH100 SXM (torch 2.9+cu126, FA3)
- [x] Mean improvement over merged SOTA (1.1194): -0.0116 BPB
- [x] All runs under 16MB artifact limit (15.3MB)
- [x] All runs under 600s training wallclock
- [ ] Full training logs available (summaries included, full logs on request)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
